description: Address 3 issues from the 2026-07-12 review: missing custom event dispatch in recently-viewed, unbounded static asset cache in SW, and inert PageTransition animation.
steps: In lib/recently-viewed.ts, dispatch a custom event 'recently-viewed-updated' after the localStorage.setItem call in addRecentlyViewed, enabling same-tab sync for the RecentlyViewed component.
In public/sw.js, add trimCache call for the CACHE_NAME (static asset cache) with a larger limit (e.g., 100 entries) in the static asset fetch handler.

Remove the PageTransition wrapper from layout.tsx since the CSS animation only fires on initial mount and is effectively dead code for client-side navigations. Remove the PageTransition component file or leave it unused.
acceptance_criteria: addRecentlyViewed dispatches 'recently-viewed-updated' event after writing to localStorage
Static asset cache (CACHE_NAME) has trimCache eviction with a max of 100 entries
PageTransition wrapper is removed from layout.tsx
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors
